scripts.start: cross-env SERVER_TYPE=private DEBUG=true ccweb-add-on-scripts start --use webpack
scripts.start-private: cross-env SERVER_TYPE=distribution DAILY_IMAGE_GENERATION_LIMIT=100 DEBUG=true ccweb-add-on-scripts start --use webpack
scripts.package-dev: cross-env SERVER_TYPE=private DEBUG=true ccweb-add-on-scripts package --use webpack
scripts.package-private: cross-env SERVER_TYPE=distribution DAILY_IMAGE_GENERATION_LIMIT=100 DEBUG=true ccweb-add-on-scripts package --use webpack
scripts.package-live: cross-env SERVER_TYPE=distribution DEBUG=false ccweb-add-on-scripts package --use webpack
